title: Alone Against Rome
writer: Gianni Astolfi, Ernesto Gastaldi, Ennio Mancini
actors: Lang Jeffries, Rossana Podestà, Philippe Leroy
plot: A Roman Consul, on his way to fight a border war, stations a garrison of soldiers in a provincial town. The townspeople aren't happy with this situation but decide it's in their best interests to cooperate. However, the Tribune le...
